The Blog

Guides, tips, and updates from the apps I build.

Solunar: Best Fishing Times

  • 10 July 2026 · Solunar: Best Fishing Times What Is the Best Time to Fish Today? Find the best time to fish today using major and minor feeding windows, moon position, and a simple daily rating anglers actually trust.

Ollama Connect

  • 10 July 2026 · Ollama Connect How to Chat with Ollama from Your iPhone Set up an Ollama iPhone client in minutes: run Ollama on your Mac or PC, expose it on your network, and chat with your local models on the go.

Baby Screen Lock: Kid Safe

  • 10 July 2026 · Baby Screen Lock: Kid Safe How to Lock Your iPhone Screen for a Baby Learn how to lock your iPhone screen for a baby using Guided Access, plus a faster app-based alternative that keeps little fingers from causing chaos.
